meaning: n.传令员,叫卖者,喊叫者,哭泣者
examples: And you will be a crier for sure.
Leave her alone. She's natural crier.
He has been designated the crier of this village.
Skype hired a town crier in colonial garb to read aloud tweets on the street.
"I am a big crier, so I will probably cry for about an hour, " Porter said.
